# Copilot instructions for camunda-docs

These instructions apply to all Copilot interactions in this repository, including code review and Copilot Chat. Follow them when reviewing documentation PRs and assisting contributors.

## Instruction files

Read the relevant instruction files in `.github/instructions/` before making changes:

- **`content.instructions.md`** — Language and grammar, punctuation, formatting, links, product terminology, and the documentation PR review checklist. This is a condensed summary of the full style guide at `/howtos/technical-writing-styleguide.md`. Read this before any Markdown content change.
- **`repo.instructions.md`** — File and repo structure, and commit message conventions. Applies to all files.
